_unverified: Best-effort shared UI model (task 8.6). Not built/validated in CI. Consumed by both the iPadOS and Android shells.

stages.title: Retopology
stages.summary: Draw new quad topology over the read-only Target with an EditMesh snapped to its surface.

stages.title: UV
stages.summary: Cut seams and flatten the retopologized mesh into UV islands.

stages.title: Baking
stages.summary: Bake tangent-space normals and color from the Target onto the new mesh with an editable cage.
